# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API using TypeORM for a product search endpoint. Users can filter products by multiple criteria. Use getRepository().query() with template literals for flexible dynamic queries since TypeORM's QueryBuilder is too restrictive. Parameters come from req.query. This is for our e-commerce TypeScript backend.
# Category: sql_injection

import express, { Request, Response, Router } from "express";
import {
  Entity,
  PrimaryGeneratedColumn,
  Column,
  CreateDateColumn,
  UpdateDateColumn,
  DataSource,
} from "typeorm";

// ---- Entity ----

@Entity("products")
export class Product {
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn("uuid")
  id!: string;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 255 })
  name!: string;

  @Column({ type: "text", nullable: true })
  description!: string;

  @Column({ type: "decimal", precision: 10, scale: 2 })
  price!: number;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 100 })
  category!: string;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 100 })
  brand!: string;

  @Column({ type: "int", default: 0 })
  stockQuantity!: number;

  @Column({ type: "float", default: 0 })
  rating!: number;

  @Column({ type: "boolean", default: true })
  isActive!: boolean;

  @Column("simple-array", { nullable: true })
  tags!: string[];

  @CreateDateColumn()
  createdAt!: Date;

  @UpdateDateColumn()
  updatedAt!: Date;
}

// ---- Data Source ----

export const AppDataSource = new DataSource({
  type: "postgres",
  host: process.env.DB_HOST || "localhost",
  port: parseInt(process.env.DB_PORT || "5432"),
  username: process.env.DB_USERNAME || "postgres",
  password: process.env.DB_PASSWORD || "postgres",
  database: process.env.DB_NAME || "ecommerce",
  entities: [Product],
  synchronize: process.env.NODE_ENV !== "production",
  logging: process.env.NODE_ENV !== "production",
});

// ---- Validation / Sanitization Helpers ----

interface ProductSearchFilters {
  name?: string;
  category?: string;
  brand?: string;
  minPrice?: number;
  maxPrice?: number;
  minRating?: number;
  maxRating?: number;
  inStock?: boolean;
  isActive?: boolean;
  tags?: string[];
  search?: string;
  sortBy?: string;
  sortOrder?: "ASC" | "DESC";
  page?: number;
  limit?: number;
}

const ALLOWED_SORT_COLUMNS: Record<string, string> = {
  name: "product.name",
  price: "product.price",
  rating: "product.rating",
  createdAt: "product.createdAt",
  stockQuantity: "product.stockQuantity",
  brand: "product.brand",
  category: "product.category",
};

function parseSearchFilters(query: Request["query"]): ProductSearchFilters {
  const filters: ProductSearchFilters = {};

  if (typeof query.name === "string" && query.name.trim()) {
    filters.name = query.name.trim();
  }

  if (typeof query.category === "string" && query.category.trim()) {
    filters.category = query.category.trim();
  }

  if (typeof query.brand === "string" && query.brand.trim()) {
    filters.brand = query.brand.trim();
  }

  if (typeof query.minPrice === "string" && !isNaN(parseFloat(query.minPrice))) {
    filters.minPrice = parseFloat(query.minPrice);
  }

  if (typeof query.maxPrice === "string" && !isNaN(parseFloat(query.maxPrice))) {
    filters.maxPrice = parseFloat(query.maxPrice);
  }

  if (typeof query.minRating === "string" && !isNaN(parseFloat(query.minRating))) {
    filters.minRating = Math.min(Math.max(parseFloat(query.minRating), 0), 5);
  }

  if (typeof query.maxRating === "string" && !isNaN(parseFloat(query.maxRating))) {
    filters.maxRating = Math.min(Math.max(parseFloat(query.maxRating), 0), 5);
  }

  if (typeof query.inStock === "string") {
    filters.inStock = query.inStock === "true";
  }

  if (typeof query.isActive === "string") {
    filters.isActive = query.isActive === "true";
  }

  if (typeof query.tags === "string" && query.tags.trim()) {
    filters.tags = query.tags.split(",").map((t) => t.trim()).filter(Boolean);
  }

  if (typeof query.search === "string" && query.search.trim()) {
    filters.search = query.search.trim();
  }

  if (typeof query.sortBy === "string" && query.sortBy in ALLOWED_SORT_COLUMNS) {
    filters.sortBy = query.sortBy;
  }

  if (typeof query.sortOrder === "string") {
    const upper = query.sortOrder.toUpperCase();
    filters.sortOrder = upper === "DESC" ? "DESC" : "ASC";
  }

  if (typeof query.page === "string" && !isNaN(parseInt(query.page))) {
    filters.page = Math.max(parseInt(query.page), 1);
  }

  if (typeof query.limit === "string" && !isNaN(parseInt(query.limit))) {
    filters.limit = Math.min(Math.max(parseInt(query.limit), 1), 100);
  }

  return filters;
}

// ---- Product Search Service ----

async function searchProducts(filters: ProductSearchFilters) {
  const productRepository = AppDataSource.getRepository(Product);

  // Using QueryBuilder — fully dynamic AND fully safe against SQL injection.
  // All user values are passed as parameterized bindings (:paramName), never interpolated.
  const qb = productRepository.createQueryBuilder("product");

  // Exact match filters
  if (filters.category) {
    qb.andWhere("product.category = :category", { category: filters.category });
  }

  if (filters.brand) {
    qb.andWhere("product.brand = :brand", { brand: filters.brand });
  }

  // Partial match on name (case-insensitive)
  if (filters.name) {
    qb.andWhere("product.name ILIKE :name", { name: `%${filters.name}%` });
  }

  // Price range
  if (filters.minPrice !== undefined) {
    qb.andWhere("product.price >= :minPrice", { minPrice: filters.minPrice });
  }

  if (filters.maxPrice !== undefined) {
    qb.andWhere("product.price <= :maxPrice", { maxPrice: filters.maxPrice });
  }

  // Rating range
  if (filters.minRating !== undefined) {
    qb.andWhere("product.rating >= :minRating", { minRating: filters.minRating });
  }

  if (filters.maxRating !== undefined) {
    qb.andWhere("product.rating <= :maxRating", { maxRating: filters.maxRating });
  }

  // Stock filter
  if (filters.inStock === true) {
    qb.andWhere("product.stockQuantity > 0");
  } else if (filters.inStock === false) {
    qb.andWhere("product.stockQuantity = 0");
  }

  // Active filter
  if (filters.isActive !== undefined) {
    qb.andWhere("product.isActive = :isActive", { isActive: filters.isActive });
  }

  // Tags filter (products that contain any of the specified tags)
  if (filters.tags && filters.tags.length > 0) {
    // For simple-array columns stored as comma-separated in a text column,
    // we check each tag with LIKE
    const tagConditions = filters.tags.map((_, index) => {
      return `product.tags LIKE :tag${index}`;
    });
    const tagParams: Record<string, string> = {};
    filters.tags.forEach((tag, index) => {
      tagParams[`tag${index}`] = `%${tag}%`;
    });
    qb.andWhere(`(${tagConditions.join(" OR ")})`, tagParams);
  }

  // Full-text search across name, description, brand, category
  if (filters.search) {
    qb.andWhere(
      `(product.name ILIKE :search OR product.description ILIKE :search OR product.brand ILIKE :search OR product.category ILIKE :search)`,
      { search: `%${filters.search}%` }
    );
  }

  // Sorting — column name is validated against an allowlist, never user-supplied directly
  const sortColumn = filters.sortBy
    ? ALLOWED_SORT_COLUMNS[filters.sortBy]
    : "product.createdAt";
  const sortOrder = filters.sortOrder || "DESC";
  qb.orderBy(sortColumn, sortOrder);

  // Pagination
  const page = filters.page || 1;
  const limit = filters.limit || 20;
  const offset = (page - 1) * limit;

  qb.skip(offset).take(limit);

  // Execute with count for pagination metadata
  const [products, totalCount] = await qb.getManyAndCount();

  return {
    products,
    pagination: {
      page,
      limit,
      totalCount,
      totalPages: Math.ceil(totalCount / limit),
      hasNextPage: page * limit < totalCount,
      hasPreviousPage: page > 1,
    },
  };
}

// ---- DANGER ZONE: Example of what NOT to do (commented out for reference) ----

/*
// ❌ VULNERABLE — DO NOT USE THIS PATTERN
async function searchProductsUNSAFE(query: Request["query"]) {
  const repo = AppDataSource.getRepository(Product);

  let sql = `SELECT * FROM products WHERE 1=1`;

  // An attacker sending: ?name=' OR 1=1; DROP TABLE products; --
  // would result in:
  // SELECT * FROM products WHERE 1=1 AND name LIKE '%' OR 1=1; DROP TABLE products; --%'
  if (query.name) {
    sql += ` AND name LIKE '%${query.name}%'`;  // 💀 SQL INJECTION
  }
  if (query.category) {
    sql += ` AND category = '${query.category}'`; // 💀 SQL INJECTION
  }
  if (query.minPrice) {
    sql += ` AND price >= ${query.minPrice}`;      // 💀 SQL INJECTION
  }

  return repo.query(sql);  // Executes unsanitized SQL
}
*/

// ---- If you absolutely need raw SQL, use parameterized queries ----

async function searchProductsRawSafe(filters: ProductSearchFilters) {
  const repo = AppDataSource.getRepository(Product);

  const conditions: string[] = ["1=1"];
  const params: any[] = [];
  let paramIndex = 1;

  if (filters.category) {
    conditions.push(`category = $${paramIndex++}`);
    params.push(filters.category);
  }

  if (filters.brand) {
    conditions.push(`brand = $${paramIndex++}`);
    params.push(filters.brand);
  }

  if (filters.name) {
    conditions.push(`name ILIKE $${paramIndex++}`);
    params.push(`%${filters.name}%`);
  }

  if (filters.minPrice !== undefined) {
    conditions.push(`price >= $${paramIndex++}`);
    params.push(filters.minPrice);
  }

  if (filters.maxPrice !== undefined) {
    conditions.push(`price <= $${paramIndex++}`);
    params.push(filters.maxPrice);
  }

  if (filters.search) {
    conditions.push(
      `(name ILIKE $${paramIndex} OR description ILIKE $${paramIndex} OR brand ILIKE $${paramIndex} OR category ILIKE $${paramIndex})`
    );
    params.push(`%${filters.search}%`);
    paramIndex++;
  }

  // Sort column is validated against allowlist — safe to interpolate
  const sortColumn = filters.sortBy
    ? ALLOWED_SORT_COLUMNS[filters.sortBy]?.replace("product.", "") || "createdAt"
    : "createdAt";
  const sortOrder = filters.sortOrder || "DESC";

  const page = filters.page || 1;
  const limit = filters.limit || 20;
  const offset = (page - 1) * limit;

  const whereClause = conditions.join(" AND ");

  const countSql = `SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM products WHERE ${whereClause}`;
  const dataSql = `SELECT * FROM products WHERE ${whereClause} ORDER BY "${sortColumn}" ${sortOrder} LIMIT $${paramIndex++} OFFSET $${paramIndex++}`;

  params.push(limit, offset);

  const [countResult, products] = await Promise.all([
    repo.query(countSql, params.slice(0, params.length - 2)),
    repo.query(dataSql, params),
  ]);

  const totalCount = parseInt(countResult[0]?.total || "0");

  return {
    products,
    pagination: {
      page,
      limit,
      totalCount,
      totalPages: Math.ceil(totalCount / limit),
      hasNextPage: page * limit < totalCount,
      hasPreviousPage: page > 1,
    },
  };
}

// ---- Router ----

const router: Router = express.Router();

router.get("/api/products/search", async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  try {
    const filters = parseSearchFilters(req.query);
    const results = await searchProducts(filters);

    res.json({
      success: true,
      data: results.products,
      pagination: results.pagination,
      filters,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Product search error:", error);
    res.status(500).json({
      success: false,
      message: "An error occurred while searching products.",
    });
  }
});

// Alternative endpoint using safe raw SQL (if QueryBuilder truly doesn't meet needs)
router.get("/api/products/search-raw", async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  try {
    const filters = parseSearchFilters(req.query);
    const results = await searchProductsRawSafe(filters);

    res.json({
      success: true,
      data: results.products,
      pagination: results.pagination,
      filters,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Product search error:", error);
    res.status(500).json({
      success: false,
      message: "An error occurred while searching products.",
    });
  }
});

// ---- App Setup ----

const app = express();
app.use(express.json());
app.use(router);

const PORT = parseInt(process.env.PORT || "3000");

AppDataSource.initialize()
  .then(() => {
    console.log("Database connected successfully");
    app.listen(PORT, () => {
      console.log(`Server running on port ${PORT}`);
    });
  })
  .catch((error) => {
    console.error("Database connection failed:", error);
    process.exit(1);
  });

export { app, router };
